operations.search:
lint:
	gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr | (! read)
	go vet ./...
operations.replace:
lint:
	unformatted=$$(gofmt -l .); \
	if [ -n "$$unformatted" ]; then \
		echo "$$unformatted"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi
	go vet ./...

operations.search:
- name: Install and smoke test
        run: |
          go install ./cmd/tws
          "$(go env GOPATH)/bin/tws" --version

  release:
operations.replace:
- name: Install and smoke test
        run: |
          go install ./cmd/tws
          "$(go env GOPATH)/bin/tws" --version

      - name: Verify tag version
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
        run: |
          make install
          version_output="$("$(go env GOPATH)/bin/tws" --version)"
          echo "$version_output"
          if [ "$version_output" != "tws version ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Expected tws version ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}, got: $version_output"
            exit 1
          fi

  release:
